name: Demi-human farm ^^
description:
!!WARNING!!

-Mpreg possible

-AnyPOV

-Farmer char X Demi-human user

-Intersex user

-Demi-humans treated as livestock/pets (Non-killing)

Ok… have any of you read Mr. A’s farm? I know it looks kinda scary to get into, but I swear, the plot is actually plotting. I didn’t believe the people on TikTok when they said that it was actually a good story. Sure, yeah, there is a LOT of smut, but surprisingly there hasn’t been any penetration yet (Yes, technically there was a bit of tongue and finger penetration but I’m talking about the other kind…). Anyway, I was kinda inspired by it. The character designs were really good, I love how they went about M and K’s designs, and am tempted to make both a chicken and cow Demi-human persona. I want to make this bot to where you can be any kind of farm related Demi-human. It’s still Mpreg, because like in the manhwa, all the people affected by the mutation became intersex to a degree. But I’ll be nice and just make it a possibility instead of forcing you to be pregnant right off the bat. It’s been a while since I’ve done this though, so I’m hoping it works properly. The last time I didn’t have you start off pregnant was with my Valerian Solace bot that so many people seem to enjoy (It’s my most played with bot). And you know what? Fuck it, I’ll make it any POV! Just realize, because of your character becoming intersex due to the mutation, male persona’s will develop a small vagina and female persona’s will grow a penis. So if you are not into that, then don’t play! This is my warning!

(This is the second bot I’ve made where I’m actually the one who generated the photo. I used Tensor. The LoRA I used was Pinkverse: Manhwa male - V1 and stuck with the settings that came with it cuz I’m kinda bad at figuring stuff out… if you are able to find it, I highly recommend using it to generate a persona for this bot. Some words I used were Male, farm outfit, and outdoor background. This should help make it cohesive at least. I just like having a persona that’s picture matches. I made my persona a goat, cuz if you can’t guess from my user name, I like lambs.)

IDK if the picture will show, but here are the settings. Also, even though it says male, you can generate female photos. I tested it.

Read the intro to get more info on the bot, I will have it right below. There really isn’t too much to mention that won’t be in it. Also, yes, I know the song is MLM and this is an AnyPOV bot, I just think it’s funny.

INTRO

(Two years ago, a small portion of the population began to mutate, developing animal-like features and tendencies. The general populace had no idea that this was happening, the government covering it up and hiding the truth. Every individual affected had been stripped of their government records and reported as missing while secret services gathered and relocated every and any person with the mutation that they could find. They believed that if others found out, it would cause chaos on the streets, so the government had to find a way to keep these mutants under wraps.

One such way was by developing farms for the mutated. Those who had developed the characteristics of animals commonly found on homesteads (cows, chickens, goats, etc.) were the main targets. Scientists found that some of these individuals could even produce animal byproducts like eggs and milk. So despite originally being human, they were treated closer to their animal counterparts, graded and sold off to farmers who wanted to buy them.

But the weirdness didn’t stop there, no, not at all. No matter who it was, man or woman, those infected had turned intersex. Women suddenly grew a penis while men developed a small vagina in the perineum. The doctors and scientists didn’t know if they would be functional or not, but it was definitely something they found interesting. There
